_comment: Seed list of known voice AI healthcare competitors. fb_page_id is auto-resolved by the fragment — you don't need to fill it in. If you find a page ID manually, add it to manual_page_id_overrides below and it will take priority.
_comment_manual_overrides: Add manually found Facebook page IDs here. Key = competitor key (slug), value = numeric FB page ID string. These always win over auto-discovery and config fb_page_id values. Example: "hyro": "123456789012345"

competitors.name: Hyro
competitors.description: AI-powered voice and chat for healthcare systems, hospitals, and medical practices

competitors.name: Synthflow AI
competitors.description: No-code AI voice agent platform; widely adopted in medical and dental front desk automation

competitors.name: Bland AI
competitors.description: AI phone calling platform for automated patient intake, scheduling, and reminders

competitors.name: Retell AI
competitors.description: Voice AI platform for building and deploying AI phone agents; used in healthcare scheduling

competitors.name: Vapi
competitors.description: Developer-first voice AI platform; used by healthcare startups for AI receptionist builds

competitors.name: My AI Front Desk
competitors.description: AI receptionist specifically targeting small medical and dental practices for after-hours call handling

competitors.name: Outbound AI
competitors.description: AI phone agent for healthcare — handles scheduling, billing inquiries, and patient outreach

competitors.name: Thoughtful AI
competitors.description: Healthcare revenue cycle automation AI — eligibility, prior auth, and patient scheduling agents

competitors.name: Parlance
competitors.description: Voice AI and natural language IVR for hospitals and health systems — patient self-service calls

competitors.name: Orbita
competitors.description: Conversational AI platform for healthcare — voice and chat for patient access, scheduling, FAQs

competitors.name: Aiva Health
competitors.description: AI voice assistant for hospitals — patients use voice to reach nurses and request services

competitors.name: Avaamo
competitors.description: Enterprise conversational AI — large health system deployments for scheduling and triage

competitors.name: Kore.ai
competitors.description: Enterprise AI platform with healthcare voice agent templates for front desk and call center

competitors.name: Luma Health
competitors.description: Patient success platform with AI-powered scheduling, recalls, and automated patient communication

competitors.name: Klara
competitors.description: Patient communication platform — messaging and virtual front desk for medical practices

competitors.name: Relatient
competitors.description: Patient scheduling and engagement — AI-assisted appointment booking and reminders

competitors.name: Air AI
competitors.description: AI phone agent platform with 24/7 call handling; pitched heavily to medical and dental offices

competitors.name: Solv Health
competitors.description: Same-day appointment booking and patient intake automation for urgent care and primary care

discovery._comment: Keywords used to search Meta Ad Library for undiscovered voice AI healthcare competitors. Runs on every fragment invocation.
